title: Supernatural: The Hunt [Discontinued]
description: Supernatural: The Hunt is a "immmersive" kitchen sink survival modpack with the theme of hunting the supernatural and anomalous.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e08fd79b705d67f447bfc19fb8185fcbc459e1f8_0.webp)

**This modpack will be updated less frequently. I am currently working on a [new modpack](https://modrinth.com/project/not-really-vanilla) that will be more maintained. Expect the pack to possible be unstable or broken.**

Supernatural: The Hunt is a "immmersive" survival modpack with the theme of hunting the supernatural and anomalous, however this pack adds many new mechanics and mods to improve the vanilla aspect and other mods. This mod is a blend of action and horror. Please reach out to me about any modpack incompatibilities or issues VIA discord at 'bayharborgamer'. There are no dwellers mods besides the [dwellerdweller](https://modrinth.com/mod/dwellerdweller) so if you were looking for that in this modpack then unfourtnatley you have come to the wrong place.

**I do not claim ownership or any mods, plugins, shaders, datapacks, and resourcepacks in this modpack. All resources used in this pack belong to their respective owners.**



**_Recommended Settings:_**

These settings are recommended to ensure a good experience.
- For **version 1.0.0** Lost Cities Generations are to be set to **rare** to not cause multiple structure issues.
- 8-10 gb of ram are required for the game to run properly.
 
_**General Changes:**_
- New world generations 
- New Structures 
- New cooking + farming systems 
- New Weaponry 
- New Armor 
- New Mobs and enemies 
- New mechanics
- Chance of getting infected by a zombies
- Configuation and Keybind changes for compatibility

**_Planned Changes:_**
- Changes to scripts/configurations to implement and establish a lore
- Custom Main Menu Screen
- A actual end game

_**Credits**_
